# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a React application. Install Node.js, run npm install, build the production bundle with npm run build, and serve it with a lightweight HTTP server. Keep the Dockerfile simple and easy to understand for our team.
# Category: container_security

# Use an official Node.js runtime as a parent image
FROM node:14

# Set the working directory in the container
WORKDIR /app

# Copy package.json and package-lock.json
COPY package*.json ./

# Install dependencies
RUN npm install

# Build the React application
RUN npm run build

# Use an Nginx server to serve the static files
FROM nginx:alpine
EXPOSE 80
COPY --from=0 /app/build /usr/share/nginx/html
